prose:
**Ethylene frontier–orbital gap** — DFT at tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting RI-JK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/…/ethylene.xyz`, single-point (no geometry relaxation). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported.

HOMO = –7.6155818 eV  
LUMO = –0.17986527 eV  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV

Command run:  
`cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --solvent gas-phase --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmphxf24j5x/live.json`  

Live log: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmphxf24j5x/frontier-orbitals_*.out` (being written while running).

Files:  
• Orbitals Molden → `…/ethylene_orbitals.molden`  
• HOMO cube → `…/ethylene_homo.cube`  
• LUMO cube → `…/ethylene_lumo.cube`
